extra.reason: Fixed: exception handler now returns status='error' with error message and diagnostics; logged at WARNING level
Added timed_seval wrapper in _bridge.py with configurable warn threshold (default 30s). Integrated into jl_call, _execute_expr, and _execute_assert hot paths.

Tightened assertions: Python API tests use exact equality, Julia IBP/VarD tests check exact canonical forms, integration tests removed vacuously-true 'or repr \!= empty' clauses and added structural checks.
Added 57 new tests for canonical_perm, Stabilizer, First, Schreier, SchreierOrbits, Dimino, Timing/AbsoluteTiming/Second, Group, PermWord, DeleteRedundantGenerators. Total XPerm tests: 91→148.
Added 43 direct tests for _parse_expression and _serialize_terms: zero/empty, coefficients (int/neg/rational), products, sums, differences, parenthesized sub-expressions, and round-trip fidelity.
duplicate of sxAct-5tka (same fix: sv_cache Vector{Any} → Vector{Union{Nothing,SchreierVector}} in XPerm.jl line 372)
compose() now uses pre-allocated similar() + @inbounds loop
Added const to _perm_dispatch, _dual_perm_dispatch, _invar_db_cache
Hoisted Regex construction: XInvar _ricci_to_riemann (before while loops), XTensor SortCovDs (shared covd_start_pat), _swap_indices (3 patterns pre-compiled)

Replaced Vector key in coeff_map with String key via _term_key_str(). Dict lookups now use String hashing (O(1) amortized) instead of nested Vector comparison. Structural data preserved in parallel struct_map for identity/serialization.
Added @warn for non-sigma unparseable coefficients; test added for malformed input warning
Globals _jl/_xcore now only set after full init success; fallback failure resets to None and raises ImportError
Replaced 26-branch if/elif in _execute_xtensor with _ACTION_HANDLERS dict + getattr dispatch. Adding new actions now requires one dict entry + one method.
Replaced numpy dependency with pure-Python _jl_to_list using .shape + column-major reshape; numpy used as fast path when available
Fixed sigma stripping to handle leading * after removal (e.g. -sigma*3/2* now parses correctly as -3//2)
Added _parallel_deriv_index and _metric_name_index reverse lookup dicts for O(1) CovDQ and SignDetOfMetric
Added 8 missing functions to __init__.py imports and __all__
commute_covds, sort_covds, riemann_simplify now return TExpr when given TExpr input

Added 15 new tests covering all 14 previously untested Python API functions: commute_covds, sort_covds, ibp, var_d, total_derivative_q, riemann_simplify, collect_tensors, all_contractions, symmetry_of, make_trace_free, check_metric_consistency, perturb_curvature, perturbation_order, perturbation_at_order
Extracted _apply_trace_rules function dispatching through _traceless_tensors and _trace_scalars registries
Replaced string concatenation with IOBuffer in _parse_nested_intlist
Used existing _metric_name_index for O(1) _factor_as_metric lookup
Sort keys are now Strings (from sxAct-kldq), sort! is direct lexicographic — no allocation per comparison
Replaced obfuscated lambda with direct dict-to-tuple comprehension
_extract_sign now validates both sign-bit positions and warns on corruption
schreier_sims filters identity generators before processing; returns trivial SGS for all-identity input
Added strip_variance to XCore as public API; internal _bare/_bare_label/_bare_index kept as local 1-liners (cross-module aliasing not viable due to module nesting)
Added string-literal tracking to _top_level_split depth loop
Added 15 edge-case tests for malformed DB input; fixed _cycles_to_images to skip out-of-range cycle elements
Replaced 17 identical hasattr tests with single parametrized test
Converted MaxIndex/MaxDualIndex/InvarCases spot-checks to data-driven @testset for loops
Pre-allocated saved_stack buffer array, passed through recursion to avoid per-level copy() allocation
Fixed WL pattern regex to not mangle snake_case names; updated 5 stale oracle snapshots

Fixed 3/10 failures: StrongGenSet signed detection false positives for degree <5. Remaining 7 are GenSet String argument issues in Butler examples (WL output format incompatibility — need test redesign).

Generated 58 xcore oracle snapshots. Julia passes 30/58 (52%). 28 failures are genuine Wolfram-Julia compatibility gaps: missing WL builtins (StringQ, Catch, AtomQ), Unicode link operator (⁀), MapIfPlus, upvalue ops, CheckOptions, FindSymbols edge cases.
Added isdefined guard before binding fresh symbols
Added max_iterations=50 counter to _preprocess_xperm_calls while loop with warning
Christoffel now created for 2D manifolds by reusing index label 1 for third slot
Created julia_names.py registry with 50+ constants. Migrated 6 most-used names (def_manifold/metric/tensor/perturbation, TensorQ, ToCanonical) from hardcoded strings to registry references.
Added 8 integration tests for xCoba: basis change end-to-end, component tensor set/get/query, trace_basis_dummy scalar trace, Jacobian retrieval
Added all-InvarCases round-trip test for RiemannToPerm/PermToRiemann + 13 new TExpr round-trip cases with idempotency check
Added _format_rational edge-case tests (8 cases including zero, unit, negative, large rationals)
Added WL→Julia translations: StringQ→isa(x,String), StringLength→length, Catch→try/catch, ClearAll→nothing
Extended identifier reader to include ⁀ (U+2040); emit Symbol("name⁀name") for compound identifiers
Changed catch from ErrorException to ArgumentError in multinomial perturb branch, matching single-factor branch
Manifold constructor now requires at least 2 index labels; added test
Replaced Union{TermAST,Nothing} with TermAST return type using ZERO_TERM sentinel. _canonicalize_term, _contract_term, _contract_one_metric all return TermAST now. Added _is_zero_term predicate.
Added 13 tests for low-dim manifolds: 1D (no Riemann/Weyl, yes Ricci/Christoffel), 2D (all curvature + antisymmetry), 3D (Einstein trace), perturb order-0 validation
Already fixed in sxAct-vmlm: sv_cache typed as Vector{Union{Nothing,SchreierVector}}
Added .env and .env.* patterns to .gitignore
Cached empty dispatch result for missing cases to avoid repeated Dict allocation
Removed redundant _canonicalize_contraction_perm call in RiemannSimplify; perms already canonical from RiemannToPerm
Added @assert to canonical_perm (perm length) and schreier_sims (n>=0, consistent generator degrees)
Added @assert to def_manifold! (dim>=1, >=2 labels, unique labels) and def_metric! (signdet in {-1,0,1})
Added @assert to LoadInvarDB (dim>=2, directory exists)
Replaced Dict-based assignment with flat Vector{Int}, pre-computed label ordinals, pre-allocated index buffers per factor. Inner loop uses @inbounds with no allocation.

WL symbolic dispatch (callable Symbols, Head[]) fundamentally incompatible with Julia adapter. Tests require WL semantics that can't be replicated. The Julia MapIfPlus implementation is tested via tensor expressions in the integration tests.
Added Rule/RuleDelayed[key,val] -> (key => val) translation and infix -> / :> -> => conversion. Also added Head[x] -> typeof(x) shim.
Already implemented: collect_tensors, all_contractions, symmetry_of, make_trace_free exported in sxAct-zh2k, with TExpr round-trip added in sxAct-op6e
Removed uv.lock from .gitignore so it will be committed for reproducible builds
Added timeout-minutes: 30 to all 6 jobs across 5 CI workflows
Reverted all 5 workflows from self-hosted to ubuntu-latest; updated commit message string

WL callable-symbol semantics (upvProp(upvSym)) fundamentally incompatible with Julia adapter. ClearAll shim added in sxAct-w3bt. Julia xUpSet\!/xTagSet\! functions work correctly and are exercised directly. Tests require WL-specific dispatch that can't be replicated.

FindSymbols and AppendToUnevaluated have intentionally different semantics in Julia vs WL. Julia FindSymbols returns only top-level symbols by design; AppendToUnevaluated uses Julia push! semantics. Output differences are expected cross-implementation.

GenSet tests compare full WL SchreierSims repr with string-labelled generators, which is a WL-specific representation. Julia SGS uses Vector{Int} generators by design. Tests should compare scalar properties (OrderOfGroup, PermMemberQ) not implementation repr.

Session struct implemented with shared-object default session. All def_*!, accessors, predicates, and xCoba functions accept session kwarg. 567 XTensor tests pass (68 new Session tests). Reader functions (ToCanonical/Contract/Simplify) deferred to follow-up.
Removed outdated Stage 1 notes from basics_julia.md, basics_python.md, and basics.md. Stage 2 has been shipped.
Fixed anchor link: #2 → #4 to match actual section number
Conditional import: stdlib tomllib on 3.11+, tomli fallback on 3.10. Dependency marker added to pyproject.toml.
9 thread-safety tests added: concurrent init (3), double-checked locking (2), concurrent ops (2), reset race (2). 896/896 Python tests pass.

Python-side thread safety complete: adapter lock (sxAct-gzqq) + 9 thread-safety tests (sxAct-v2sp). Julia-side items (sxAct-bvh9, sxAct-ot5x) remain open as deferred P3 — only relevant for pure Julia multithreading.
Removed dead loop in right_coset_rep that iterated once and broke. 156/156 XPerm tests pass.
Updated invar.jl Python examples from deprecated get_julia/jl.xAct._b API to public xact API. basics.jl was already using the public API.
Renumbered sections sequentially in 8 Julia QMD notebooks
Extracted shared _reset/manifold/metric fixtures to tests/unit/conftest.py, 315 unit tests pass
Added license, authors, classifiers, URLs to all 3 pyproject.toml files
Pinned base image to 14.3.0, added --no-cache-dir, pinned flask~=3.1.0 and wolframclient~=1.4.0
Added .github/dependabot.yml for weekly GitHub Actions and pip dependency updates

Documentation overhaul epic complete: 6/7 children closed (Documenter.jl, Rosetta Stone, Literate tutorials, CI pipeline, dir restructure, Project.toml). Only sxAct-hu2 (automated capability matrix) remains as optional enhancement.
Split into src/XTensor/{Core,Def,Canonical,Contract,Pert,Coba,XTras}.jl. All 567 XTensor + 156 XPerm + 238 TExpr tests pass.
Extracted into adapter/julia_comparison.py (477 lines). julia_stub.py reduced from 1293 to 865 lines. All 909 Python tests pass.
Split into _wl_ast.py (84), _wl_parser.py (330), _wl_evaluator.py (688). python_stub.py reduced from 1257 to 206 lines. All 909 Python tests pass.
Replaced 7 direct references to _manifolds/_tensors/_metrics with public API (ManifoldQ, TensorQ, CovDQ, get_manifold, get_tensor, list_manifolds). All 238 TExpr + 567 XTensor tests pass.
Replaced 28-branch if-chain with _HEAD_HANDLERS dispatch table. Factory helpers _h_expr() and _h_two_arg() eliminate boilerplate. All 909 Python tests pass.

After inspection, wl_to_jl() already uses a clear pipeline of named preprocessing functions (lines 138-150). Adding class-based passes would be unnecessary ceremony for a 578-line self-contained module. The existing structure is modular enough.

All 6 child tickets resolved. XTensor.jl split (5514→7 files), julia_stub.py extracted (1293→865), python_stub.py extracted (1257→206+3 submodules), TExpr decoupled from XTensor internals, action_recognizer refactored to dispatch table, wl_to_julia closed as already well-structured.

Split into 7 subfiles in test/julia/xtensor/. The 6 independent top-level testsets are now separate files. The main XTensor block (1624 lines, 345 tests) remains intact as test_core.jl since its internal testsets are interleaved across categories. All 567 tests pass.
Implemented fork-safety guard in _runtime.py with PID tracking. 7 tests passing.

Created test_xtensor_fuzz.jl with 3350 property-based tests across 20 testsets covering idempotency, symmetry, anti-zeroing, linearity, contract, simplify, Riemann orbit, products, metric trace, Weyl tracelessness. All passing.
Superseded by epic sxAct-m0c6 (unify expression parsers). Phase A (sxAct-xh47) adds immediate error guard; Phases B+C do full fix.
Deployed in 567ab18. Guard raises error on CovD bracket syntax in ToCanonical/Contract. Verified by test_core.jl tests and CI.

Deployed in 87edfdc. TensorFactor/CovDFactor/FactorNode types introduced. Parser produces CovDFactor for CD[-a][T[-b]] syntax. ToCanonical round-trips CovD expressions with recursive inner canonicalization. 6 new tests, zero regressions (573 xtensor + 156 xperm Julia, 52 adapter Python, 353 TOML regression all pass).
Deployed in 17146a2. Tasks 1-7,9 were completed in Phase B.1 (87edfdc). Task 8 (fuzz tests) added: 4 CovD fuzz suites (400 trials), all 5351 fuzz tests pass. Phase B complete.
